summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain CMC mandatory type approval from the Communications and Media Commission (هيئة الإعلام والاتصالات) before import or sale in Iraq. CMC is the federal regulatory authority for telecommunications and spectrum management in Iraq. The approval number and CMC mark must appear on the device and packaging label. Test reports from a recognised laboratory to ITU or internationally accepted EMC/radio standards are required as part of the application dossier. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not accepted as substitutes. The Iraqi Kurdistan Region (KRG) falls under the same federal CMC rules, though KRG may have additional autonomous administrative procedures.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须在进口或于伊拉克销售前，取得通信和媒体委员会（هيئة الإعلام والاتصالات）的CMC强制型号认证。CMC是伊拉克负责电信及频谱管理的联邦监管机构。设备及包装标签须标注认证编号及CMC标志。申请文件须包含经认可实验室依据ITU或国际公认EMC/无线电标准出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID及SRRC证书不可作为替代。伊拉克库尔德斯坦地区（KRG）适用相同的联邦CMC规则，但KRG可能有额外的自治行政程序。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須在進口或於伊拉克銷售前，取得通信和媒體委員會（هيئة الإعلام والاتصالات）的CMC強制型號認證。CMC是伊拉克負責電信及頻譜管理的聯邦監管機構。設備及包裝標籤須標注認證編號及CMC標誌。申請文件須包含經認可實驗室依據ITU或國際公認EMC/無線電標準出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID及SRRC證書不可作為替代。伊拉克庫爾德斯坦地區（KRG）適用相同的聯邦CMC規則，但KRG可能有額外的自治行政程序。

standards_or_laws: Iraq Communications and Media Commission Law No. 65 of 2004
CMC Type Approval Regulations and Procedures
ITU-R Radio Regulations (spectrum and technical parameters)
ITTA (Iraqi Telecom and Technology Authority) technical standards references

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products under the CCC catalogue. These Chinese approvals establish the baseline but are not recognized by Iraq CMC.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。上述中国批准构成基线，但不被伊拉克CMC承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。上述中國批准構成基線，但不被伊拉克CMC承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: CMC type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by Iraq CMC. 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth are generally permitted under CMC frequency management; 5 GHz WLAN status varies by sub-band and should be confirmed with CMC before product launch. A fresh CMC application with test reports, CMC mark, and approval number on label and packaging is required for every model sold or imported into Iraq.
gap.zh: CMC型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。SRRC批准和CCC认证均不被伊拉克CMC承认。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和蓝牙在CMC频率管理下通常获准使用；5 GHz WLAN的状态因子频段而异，应在产品上市前向CMC确认。每款在伊拉克销售或进口的产品均须重新进行CMC申请，并在标签和包装上标注测试报告、CMC标志及认证编号。
gap.zht: CMC型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。SRRC批准和CCC認證均不被伊拉克CMC承認。2.4 GHz Wi-Fi和藍牙在CMC頻率管理下通常獲准使用；5 GHz WLAN的狀態因子頻段而異，應在產品上市前向CMC確認。每款在伊拉克銷售或進口的產品均須重新進行CMC申請，並在標籤和包裝上標注測試報告、CMC標誌及認證編號。

source.publisher: CMC — Communications and Media Commission of Iraq (هيئة الإعلام والاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CMC type approval is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Iraq. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. Confirm 5 GHz band permissions with CMC prior to import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CMC型号认证对所有在伊拉克进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。进口前应向CMC确认5 GHz频段许可情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CMC型號認證對所有在伊拉克進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。進口前應向CMC確認5 GHz頻段許可情況。
